text: I feel a curious blend of awe and anticipation. The space is clearly designed for inquiry, filled with artifacts and screens that invite exploration. The words "Responsive and rapidly evolving... research innovating how humans connect and coexist with intelligent..." sit heavily in my mind, provoking thoughts about our relationship with technology and each other. Here, I am both observed and observer, called to reflect on what it means to interact and adapt in an ever-changing world.
